author: @arvh-v8n

text:
​ @orimoreau3138  I have no horse in the race of which game is "better", but I definitely saw more raw creativity and sheer output of art/music/content from the TF2 fan community than I've ever seen from Overwatch or... well, really any other game.

That's not me trying to prove superiority, it's just an acknowledgement that the TF2 community in a certain time period was a rare and beautiful thing that has yet to be surpassed. I'm sure that it will be surpassed someday, though.
